plugins.name: x-twitter-scraper
plugins.description: 99 REST API endpoints, 9 MCP tools, 20 extraction types. Tweet search, user lookup, follower extraction, engagement metrics, giveaway draws, trending topics, write actions, credits, pay-per-use (MPP), and Telegram integrations. Reads from $0.00015/call — 66x cheaper than the official X API.
